steps.question: C onsiderwhetherthecorporationshould makeaSec.179election(onForm4562)to immediately expense part or all the cost of qualifyingproperty. 5 C Corporation Income Tax Return Checklist – Form 1120 (Mini) | 1 302) Didthetaxpayeracquireanypropertyin thetaxableyearthatqualifiesforbonus depreciation(includingqualifiedimprovement property)?Ifso,determineifelectingoutof bonus depreciation is appropriate. 1. Notethatfor2025,40%bonusdepreciation appliestoeligibleassetsacquiredJan.1, 2025,throughJan.19,2025.100%bonus depreciationappliesstartingforassets placedinserviceJan.20,2025,andlater.
steps.guidance_ref: C onsiderwhetherthecorporationshould makeaSec.179election(onForm4562)to immediately expense part or all the cost of qualifyingproperty. 5 C Corporation Income Tax Return Checklist – Form 1120 (Mini) | 1 302) Didthetaxpayeracquireanypropertyin thetaxableyearthatqualifiesforbonus depreciation(includingqualifiedimprovement property)?Ifso,determineifelectingoutof bonus depreciation is appropriate. 1. Notethatfor2025,40%bonusdepreciation appliestoeligibleassetsacquiredJan.1, 2025,throughJan.19,2025.100%bonus depreciationappliesstartingforassets placedinserviceJan.20,2025,andlater.

steps.question: D idthetaxpayerincurresearchor experimental (R&E) expenses under Sec.174?DomesticR&Eexpenses,including softwaredevelopmentcosts,aregenerally deductible in the year incurred unless the taxpayeraffirmativelyelectsamortization. 1. Confirmthatthecorporationconsistently applied its chosen method and determine whetheratransitionelectionoraccounting methodchangeunderRev.Proc.2025- 28isrequiredtodeductanyamounts previously capitalized under prior law. 305) Wasanyinterestexpenserelatedtotax- exempt income? Determine any disallowed interest expense. (Sec. 265(a)(2)). 306) Determineinterestexpenselimitations underSec.163(j)ifapplicable.Notethat depreciation/amortization/depletion is anaddbackfortaxyearsbeginningafter Dec.31,2024. 307) Fortravel,mealsorbusinessgiftsincurred duringthetaxableyear,advisethetaxpayer ofdocumentationrequirements.Determine the disallowed portion of meal expenses, club dues and entertainment expense. 308) Didthetaxpayermakeanycharitable contributions(includingpropertycontributions) duringcalendaryear2025?Generally, corporationsmaydeductqualifiedcontributions upto10%oftaxableincomeandtheremaining amountcanbecarriedovertothenextfive years.Obtainnecessaryinformationforproperty contributions,ifany,includingsignedForm8283 and/orcopyofaqualifiedappraisal. 309) Didthetaxpayerproduceoracquireproperty for inventory in the taxable year? If so, verify the correct application of the uniform capitalizationrulesunderSec.263A. 310) Didthetaxpayerenteranycontractsfor themanufacture,building,installationor construction of property in the taxable year that were not completed at the end of the year? If so,considerthepropermethodofaccounting. 311) Confirmlobbyingexpenses(includingtrade association dues of which a portion is consideredlobbying)arenotdeducted.
steps.guidance_ref: D idthetaxpayerincurresearchor experimental (R&E) expenses under Sec.174?DomesticR&Eexpenses,including softwaredevelopmentcosts,aregenerally deductible in the year incurred unless the taxpayeraffirmativelyelectsamortization. 1. Confirmthatthecorporationconsistently applied its chosen method and determine whetheratransitionelectionoraccounting methodchangeunderRev.Proc.2025- 28isrequiredtodeductanyamounts previously capitalized under prior law. 305) Wasanyinterestexpenserelatedtotax- exempt income? steps.question: C onfirmthatretirementplancontributions weremadeusingtheeligiblecompensation limit. 316) Isthereanetoperatingloss(NOL)in the current taxable year? If so, prepare a supportingscheduletobeattachedtothetax return.TheNOLislimitedto80%oftaxable income and any excess can be carried forwardindefinitely(notecertainexceptions).
steps.guidance_ref: C onfirmthatretirementplancontributions weremadeusingtheeligiblecompensation limit. 316) Isthereanetoperatingloss(NOL)in the current taxable year? If so, prepare a supportingscheduletobeattachedtothetax return.TheNOLislimitedto80%oftaxable income and any excess can be carried forwardindefinitely(notecertainexceptions).
